headline: Today's top AI story: qwen-code v0.19.12 released
bullets: China's new World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization is President Xi's clearest play yet for a parallel AI order

Update now: 7-Zip fixes RCE flaw exploitable with malicious archives
